title: Export Doc to PDF (Thai characters)
excerpt:
I cannot Export pdf from Doc board in Thai characters. Because monday.com does not support exporting files in Thai language. But Thai language can be used for importing.

posts.author: sirinapha (Sirinapha Puttha)
posts.cookedHtml:
I cannot Export pdf from Doc board in Thai characters. Because monday.com does not support exporting files in Thai language. But Thai language can be used for importing.
This is a big problem for work because the data cannot be exported.
